summary: 9 years of experience as a Kıdemli İK İş Ortağı. Focused on measurable business outcomes in i̇nsan kaynakları / talent acquisition with hands-on experience in ATS, Recruitment, Competency Based Interview, Employer Branding.
title: Kıdemli İK İş Ortağı

experiences.description: Used Performance Management, Recruitment, Employee Relations to coordinated deliverables with cross-functional stakeholders. Improved a core KPI by %40 and documented repeatable operating practices for the team.
achievements: Delivered projects using Performance Management and Recruitment
Coordinated releases with stakeholders and reduced operational risk
